title: config: make warning clearer
body:
make clearer that the warning could also happen because the logger is
set to use systemd.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5443

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

Restarted the flaked test and opened https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5522 as I saw these tests flaking for a while now.
